message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam lifelinePadding 5
skinparam notePadding 5
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam noteBorderColor #000000
skinparam noteFontColor #000000
skinparam noteFontStyle plain
skinparam noteFontSize 12
skinparam noteTextAlignment center
skinparam noteBorderThickness 1
skinparam noteShadowing false
skinparam noteCornerRadius 0
skinparam noteMargin 5
skinparam noteMinWidth 50
skinparam noteMaxWidth 200
skinparam noteMinHeight 20
skinparam noteMaxHeight 100
skinparam noteMinX 0
skinparam noteMaxX 1000
skinparam noteMinY 0
skinparam noteMaxY 1000
skinparam noteZIndex 100
skinparam noteLayer "note"
skinparam noteVisibility visible
skinparam noteOpacity 100
skinparam noteTransparency 0
skinparam noteBlendMode normal
skinparam noteMixBlendMode normal
skinparam noteIsolation isolate
skinparam noteWillChange auto
skinparam noteContainment contained
skinparam noteOverflow hidden
skinparam noteClipPath none
skinparam noteMask none
skinparam noteFilter none
skinparam noteBackdropFilter none
skinparam noteTransform none
skinparam noteTransformOrigin center
skinparam noteTransformBox border-box
skinparam noteTransformStyle flat
skinparam noteTransformPerspective none
skinparam noteTransformPerspectiveOrigin center
skinparam noteTransformRotate none
skinparam noteTransformScale none
skinparam noteTransformSkew none
skinparam noteTransformTranslate none
skinparam noteTransformMatrix none
skinparam noteTransformOriginX center
skinparam noteTransformOriginY center
skinparam noteTransformOriginZ 0
skinparam noteTransformRotateX 0
skinparam noteTransformRotateY 0
skinparam noteTransformRotateZ 0
skinparam noteTransformScaleX 1
skinparam noteTransformScaleY 1
skinparam noteTransformScaleZ 1
skinparam noteTransformSkewX 0
skinparam noteTransformSkewY 0
skinparam noteTransformTranslateX 0
skinparam noteTransformTranslateY 0
skinparam noteTransformTranslateZ 0
skinparam noteTransformMatrixA 1
skinparam noteTransformMatrixB 0
skinparam noteTransformMatrixC 0
skinparam noteTransformMatrixD 1
skinparam noteTransformMatrixE 0
skinparam noteTransformMatrixF 0

title drv-ns16550

participant "入出力制御" as IOControl
participant "転送制御" as TransferControl
participant "デバイス\nファイル管理" as DeviceFileManagement
participant "MLib" as MLib

box "drv-ns16550" #LightGray
  participant "入出力制御" as IOControl
  participant "転送制御" as TransferControl
  participant "デバイス\nファイル管理" as DeviceFileManagement
end box

participant "MLib" as MLib

== 転送要求 ==

DeviceFileManagement -> TransferControl: 転送要求( COM1/2 )
activate TransferControl

TransferControl -> MLib: スピンロック( COM1/2 )
activate MLib
MLib --> TransferControl: 
deactivate MLib

opt [転送状態 == 転送停止中]
  TransferControl -> IOControl: IER書込み\n( COM1/2, [1]=1 )
  activate IOControl
  note right of TransferControl: THR割込み許可
  ref over IOControl
    入出力制御\nデバイス書込み
  end ref
  IOControl --> TransferControl: 
  deactivate IOControl
  
  TransferControl -> TransferControl: 転送状態設定( 転送中 )
end opt

TransferControl -> MLib: スピンアンロック( COM1/2 )
activate MLib
MLib --> TransferControl: 
deactivate MLib

TransferControl --> DeviceFileManagement: 
deactivate TransferControl

@enduml
